long_description:
[TEL]-fluentbit-logs count no output records for operational logs [US-SOUTH-STAGE] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/tel_fluentbit_logging_pipeline_unhealthy_agent.html
TIP Situation:                      Observed fluentbit-logs count no output records for operational logs issue in telemetry-ng-fluentbit-logs
TIP Short Description:              some fluentbit-logs pods in rias-ng-us-south-dal10-preprod have had no output records for operational logs for the last hour
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:staging:public:is-platform-integration:us-south::rias-ng-us-south-dal10-preprod::

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-3
Metric:
    count by (kube_cluster_name) ( avg by (kube_cluster_name,kube_pod_name,kube_node_name,host_hostname) (increase(fluentbit_output_proc_records_total{name="output_icl_ops_logs", kube_daemonset_name="fluentbit-logs"}[1h]) ) < 1 ) > 0 = 1.00
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'rias-ng-us-south-dal10-preprod'

Time:                12/05/2025 09:18 PM UTC
State:               Triggered

------

Triggered by Alert:
